questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Did you walk to school today? ___"
questions.answer: No, I didn't. I took the bus.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Did she call you last night? ___"
questions.answer: Yes, she did. We talked for an hour.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Did they play football yesterday? ___"
questions.answer: No, they didn't. It rained all day.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Did he eat breakfast this morning? ___"
questions.answer: Yes, he did. He had eggs and toast.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Did you and Ana study together? ___"
questions.answer: Yes, we did. We studied at the library.

questions.prompt: I _____ (go) to the shops yesterday and bought some food.
questions.answer: went

questions.prompt: She _____ (not come) to class today. I think she is ill.
questions.answer: didn't come

questions.prompt: _____ you see that film last weekend? It was really good.
questions.answer: Did

questions.prompt: We _____ (eat) pizza for dinner. It was delicious.
questions.answer: ate

questions.prompt: He _____ (not finish) his homework, so the teacher was angry.
questions.answer: didn't finish

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "I was tired last night and I goed to bed after dinner."
questions.answer: 'Go' is irregular. The past form is 'went': 'I went to bed after dinner.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "We had lunch at school and then we all went to played football."
questions.answer: After 'went to', use the base form: 'to play football.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "She woke up late so she didn't ate breakfast before school."
questions.answer: After 'didn't', use the base form: 'she didn't eat breakfast.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "My parents buyed a new car and we all went for a drive."
questions.answer: 'Buy' is irregular. The past form is 'bought': 'My parents bought a new car.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "He studied hard for the test but he didn't passed in the end."
questions.answer: After 'didn't', use the base form: 'he didn't pass.'
I went to the park yesterday.
Did she do her homework?
He didn't come to class.
We ate pizza for dinner.
Did you see the film?
